plugins.name: flightcrew
plugins.description: An independent multi-model review crew for coding agents: two blind cross-family reads plus an independent judge that filters false positives — report-only.

plugins.name: claude-tools
plugins.description: The security defaults Claude Code doesn't ship with: guard hooks (command-guard, leak-guard) that block pipe-to-shell and catch secrets before they leave, on an isolated profile. Full kit installs via shell/npm/Homebrew; the guard-hooks plugin installs via the marketplace.

plugins.name: ai-tc
plugins.description: AI Traffic Control (ai-tc) — intercept, inspect, and govern prompts and responses from AI coding tools: scan for PII, credentials, and OWASP findings, then warn, redact, or block, logged locally with slash-command reports and an optional web dashboard.
